supplementalResearch.title: 8. DeepSeek (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 8. DeepSeek (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. Extremely cheap. **All data processed in mainland China.**

**Models:**

| Model ID | Input (cache miss) $/1M | Input (cache hit) $/1M | Output $/1M | Context |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `deepseek-chat` | $0.28 | **$0.028** | $0.42 | 128K |
| `deepseek-reasoner` | $0.28 | $0.028 | $0.42 | 128K |

Both map to DeepSeek-V3.2. Automatic context caching (no config needed). Max output: 8K (chat) / 64K (reasoner).

**Rate limits:** None enforced — best-effort serving. No tiered plans.

**Free tier:** **5 million free tokens** on registration (valid 30 days). PayPal/card billing.

**Datacenters:** **Mainland China only** (Hangzhou, Hohhot). One international deployment in Saudi Arabia (Aramco). API accessible internationally but all data flows through China.

**GDPR:** ⚠️ **No GDPR adequacy decision for China.** Subject to Chinese national security laws. No SCCs mentioned.

**Integration notes:** **OpenAI-compatible API**. Base URL: `https://api.deepseek.com`. Also supports Anthropic API format. SSE streaming.

---
